heroSubtitle: The connection lives as long as you both maintain it. Each match is a separate synchronization story.
aboutHeroTitle: Relationships with a timer and emotional depth
aboutHeroBody: Time to Match is a space where connection feels alive: rhythm, atmosphere, trust and cinematic intimacy without the noise.
aboutValueQualityBody: Every profile and every connection gets atmospheric attention—not an endless feed.
aboutValueAlgoBody: AI senses pacing, silence and tension - and gently reflects this in the interface.
aboutValueSafetyBody: Trust, locks and transparent signals are a mature environment, not chaos.
aboutValueMeetBody: A timer and shared space help you move from a swipe to a real contact.
heroTimeRunning: The timer belongs to the connection, not the profile
liveSomeoneLiked: Someone just liked a profile near you
liveNewMatch: New match at 3 km - don't miss it
activityReconnectChat: Message is waiting for a response
activityEmptyChats: Dialogues are still sleeping - the first word will wake them up
activityEmptyMatches: Matches are waiting for a spark - it's closer than it seems
activityUrgencyBody: The communication timer is ticking - log in while the synchronization is still alive.
toastNewMessageBody: Open the chat - don't leave it paused.
toastNewMatchBody: Continue the conversation while the spark is alive.
toastActivityFeedBody: There is movement nearby - check the synchronization.
trustSafetySubtitle: You are safe. Manage contact with
trustSafetyReassurance: Moderation signals are handled delicately - this is a space for real people, not a “control panel”.
trustActionReportHint: Quietly, without pressure - we will sort out the situation.
trustActionMuteHint: The chat will remain, but notifications from this person will not come.
trustActionBlockHint: The profile will disappear from your feed and chats - you can cancel it in your profile.
trustReportSubtitle: Choose the closest cause - this helps us keep the environment warm and honest.
trustReportThanksBody: We pay close attention to every signal. You help keep the community alive and respectful.
trustBlockConfirmBody: This person will no longer appear in your feed or chat list. You can always change this in the trust section of your profile.
adminSubtitle: Enter your API key to view the report queue. The key stays in this tab only.
adminReportsEmpty: No reports in the queue — all clear.
adminErrorNotConfigured: ADMIN_API_KEY is not set on the server.
trustComposerMutedHint: You have disabled notifications from this chat. Messages are still visible - turn on notifications in the protection menu.
trustOwnHubSubtitle: Small steps - and acquaintances feel calmer and more sincere.
trustStepEmailBody: We do not publish the address - only the “this is you” tag.
trustStepPhotoBody: One frame in real time - without harsh frames, just to confirm the vividness.
trustStepPhotoPending: The application has been sent - it usually takes a couple of minutes.
trustOwnFooter: Time to Match is built on respect for time and people. We are there if something goes wrong.
entranceTagline: Here time is not an enemy, but an ally
onboardStorySub: Not dating. Not tape. An emotional ecosystem where time and energy matter.
onboard1Sub: Every match is intentional. You have 24 hours to start the conversation.
onboard2Sub: Mutual sympathy opens up space for dialogue. Chemistry grows with you.
onboard3Sub: Vibe, energy, communication style - a profile that is felt, not filled out.
mvpOnboard1Sub: Mutual likes open a chat for one day. Send the first message — or the match disappears.
mvpOnboard2Sub: 20 free likes per day. Premium: unlimited likes, see who liked you, priority in the feed. Boost: 30 minutes on top.
mvpOnboard3Sub: Complete your profile, enable location, and swipe with intention — time is part of the game.
paywallUrgency: Limited time — unlock before your matches expire
datingMatchSubtitle: You have 24 hours to say hello
premiumSheetHintLikedYou: See who liked you and match back instantly.
likesPaywallBody: {count} people are waiting. Get Premium to see them.
likesPaywallOverlay: Profiles hidden — Premium reveals who liked you
guidedStepProfileSub: People connect with a face and a real name — this is how you appear in the feed.
guidedStepInterestsSub: A few interests help us show you better matches.
chatOnlineTooltip: Partner is online — likely to reply soon
connectionFadingLong: You haven't spoken in a while. The clock doesn't stop.
connectionMatchStarted: Your 24 hours just started. Say something real.
pulseAiError: Could not get a response. Try again.
pulseInboxPreview: Time to Match AI guide — ask about chats and connection
pulseWelcome: Hey! I'm Pulse, your Time to Match AI guide. I can help with openers, keeping a chat alive, or reading the vibe. What do you want to talk about?
chatDeleteBody: Message history with this person will be removed on this device. The match stays until it expires.
syncStatusWaiting: Answer - the connection will come to life
syncStreakDays: {days} days in a row in touch
landingHeroTagline: Time waits for you here - it tells you when to act
heroConnectionSubtitle: A match lives for 24 hours. Cherish the spark while the connection burns.
landingEvolutionSubtitle: From the first touch to deep emotional synchronization - in one timeline.
landingEvolutionStep1Desc: A slight impulse - curiosity, the first rhythm, a hint of compatibility.
landingEvolutionStep2Desc: The dialogue is leveling out. The energy of connection rises with every response.
landingEvolutionStep3Desc: The spark stabilizes in heat. Conversations become more meaningful.
landingEvolutionStep4Desc: Stable bond. You feel like the system knows your dynamics.
ttmLandingHeroSub: No ghosting. No 'I'll reply tomorrow.' Just one real day.
ttmLandingHowTitle: How a stranger becomes someone important
ttmLandingHowStep1Desc: Three picks a day. Scarcity creates clarity — you actually look at who's in front of you.
ttmLandingHowStep2Desc: When you both say yes, the clock starts. Not next week. Right now.
ttmLandingHowStep3Desc: One day to have the conversation that might change something. After that — it's gone. Which is exactly why it matters.
ttmLandingProblemTitle: Dating apps taught us to be lazy.
ttmLandingProblemSub: Match now. Reply never. The inbox fills up while real connections rot. Nothing forces you to actually show up — and so most people don't.
ttmLandingProblemPain1: You match. You send 'hey'. You wait three days. Nothing.
ttmLandingProblemPain2: Conversations die at 'how are you' because nobody has to try.
ttmLandingProblemPain3: 500 matches. Zero dates. An inbox that feels like a graveyard.
ttmLandingProblemPain4: Swiping becomes a habit, not a search. You stop expecting anything real.
ttmLandingSolutionCountdownHint: When the timer hits zero, this match is gone — no second chances.
ttmLandingSolutionSub: 24 hours isn't a gimmick. It's a mirror. When time is real, people get real. The conversations that happen under the clock are different — more honest, more alive.
ttmLandingSolutionPoint1: Real-time timer visible on every match — you always know how much time is left.
ttmLandingSolutionPoint2: Urgency creates momentum. People actually reply when the clock is ticking.
ttmLandingChatTitle: The clock is in the room with you.
ttmLandingChatSub: You can see it. They can see it. That shared pressure turns matches into real conversations — fast.
ttmLandingChatMsg1: I almost didn't swipe right. Glad I did.
ttmLandingChatMsg2: Same. I usually don't reply this fast.
ttmLandingChatMsg3: The timer changes things, doesn't it.
ttmLandingChatUrgency: ⏳ 6 hours left — say what you actually mean.
ttmLandingBenefitsTitle: Built for people who are done wasting time
ttmLandingBenefit1Desc: Matches disappear after 24 hours. Nobody lingers in your inbox pretending they'll reply someday.
ttmLandingBenefit2Desc: The clock cuts through small talk. People show up ready — not just to collect another match.
ttmLandingBenefit3Desc: Three picks a day. You stop scrolling and start seeing.
ttmLandingBenefit4Desc: 24 hours of real conversation tells you more than six weeks of 'wyd' texts.
ttmLandingBenefit5Desc: When the window closes, passive swipers disappear. The ones who stay are the ones who showed up.
ttmLandingFinalSub: You have 24 hours from the moment you match. Not from when you feel ready.
ttmLandingFinalNote: No credit card · Takes 30 seconds · No ghosting guaranteed
chatInsightChemistryStronger: The chemistry between you got stronger.
chatInsightBondStabilizing: The connection stabilizes - the rhythm evens out.
chatInsightSyncGrowing: SYNC is growing - you are on the same wavelength.
chatInsightEnergyCooling: The energy of connection cools down. Return to the dialogue.
aiInsightTonight: Today's conversation strengthened the emotional connection.

aiInsightMoreStable: The connection has become more stable.
aiInsightEnergyGrowing: The energy of communication is growing.

aiInsightRhythm: The rhythm between you forms a connection.
relMomentFirstDeepTalkSub: You opened up to each other.
relMomentThreeNightsSub: The nights have become your space.
relMomentHighSyncWeekSub: The connection kept pace all week.
relMomentEmotionalPeakSub: One of the most powerful moments of connection.
heroEmotionalLine1: Some people you meet for a reason.
heroEmotionalLine2: 24 hours to find out if this is one of those times.
heroEmotionalSubtitle: Connections that matter don't wait forever. And neither should you.
profilesSubtitle: Each profile fades away. Swiping is not a game, but a choice while there is still time.
discoverGateBody: Add a photo, gender, and city so others can see you in Discover.
swipeSubtitle: Swipe right - chance. To the left - and the connection may disappear forever.
swipeUrgencyStrip: The match gives 24 hours. Write - and the connection will remain alive.

howSubtitle: Resonance, synchronization and emotional depth are not static questionnaires, but living dynamics.
step1Desc: Discover shows compatibility and atmosphere - right down to the first message.
step2Desc: The mutual energy opens up a space of dialogue with live SYNC and chemistry.
step3Desc: Each message moves bond, chemistry and energy - the connection grows over time.
ctaSubtitle: Create a profile and feel how connections grow — they don't vanish in the feed.
footerTagline: Connections live as long as you choose them.
copyright: Time to Match. All rights reserved.
locationBannerText: Turn on geolocation to see distances to profiles near you.
regPageSubtitle: After registration - swipes and live matches with a communication timer
regIdentityLead: A couple of tags and the profile will become alive.

regSuccessSubtitle: Profile in the feed. Find a match and the synchronization will begin.
regErrorPassword: The password must be at least 8 characters
regErrorAge: You must be at least 18 years old
welcomeSubtitle: Every mutual match is its own connection with a 24-hour timer and SYNC level.
welcomeConnectionBody: When you both like each other, the clock starts. Write something real before it runs out.
welcomeMatchTimerBody: Starts after you both like each other. Message while the connection still burns.

datingHow2Text: Start the conversation before time runs out.

datingFeature3Text: AI reads chemistry signals you might miss.

ttmXpHeroSubtitle: Some people appear in your life for a reason. You have 24 hours to find out who they are.
ttmXpImmersionTap: Tap to respond to the match
ttmXpPressureSubtitle: Without a deadline, tomorrow always seems safer. 24 hours removes that excuse. No hiding behind 'I'll reply later.' Either this matters — or it doesn't.
ttmXpPressureLoss: The window closes. The moment doesn't come back.
ttmXpMotionEmpty: You've seen everyone for today. Come back tomorrow.

ttmXpConnectionMsgThem: Maybe that's why it's easier. We have 24 hours.
